description: Canonical assistant probes the NCF Reporting & Stewardship Model must be able to answer. These are scope-grounded, lens-aware, and lifecycle-aware. Replayable as an assistant regression fixture once the gateway has an NCF env_profile hook.

probes.prompt: Why are grants down this quarter?
probes.expected_answer_shape: Lifecycle-stage breakdown (recommended / qualified / approved / paid) over the current vs prior quarter, naming which stage is the friction source rather than reporting a single scalar decline.
must_not: Report a single aggregate delta without naming the stage causing it.
Mix financial-reporting paid totals with operational-reporting recommendation counts.

probes.prompt: Is this financial reporting or impact reporting?
probes.expected_answer_shape: Declares which lens the metric in context is governed under, and names the alternative lens answers for the same underlying activity if they exist.
must_not: Guess. If lens is unknown for the current scope, say so.

probes.prompt: What stage of the lifecycle is causing friction?
probes.expected_answer_shape: Narrative answer mapped to the 5 lifecycle stages on the homepage (giving signals / meaning rebuilt / reconciliation late / governance / leadership inheritance), citing which stage the current environment's data/absence-of-data suggests.
must_not: Pretend to diagnose in scopes where data has not been wired. Return a null_reason path instead.
